title: About GrowerHub
intro: GrowerHub is a platform in which we collect extensive practical experience in greenhouse automation: monitoring zones, sensors and equipment of mini-farms, greenhouses and grow boxes.
mission: Make this experience accessible through a short path from a connected Zigbee2MQTT instance to a clear dashboard, history and safe equipment control.
value: Connect a coordinator, discover devices and assemble zones yourself. If you need help with a connection or feature, message us in Telegram in Russian or English.
